summary: Report output changes from the assessment app can affect proposal generation and formatting.
recommended_validation: Regenerate proposal from a current assessment output sample.
Validate client-facing formatting, public-safe language, and PDF/print layout before treating downstream output as ready.

summary: The assessment app consumes generated demand data; schema or semantic changes upstream can alter Customer Demand Fit report behavior.
recommended_validation: Check schema compatibility against active demand dataset.
Run sample report generation for supported local-service sectors.

summary: Assessment reports can now include Welding demand fit and estimated monthly searches in demand opportunities; downstream proposal generation should handle the new sector label and optional monthly volume fields.
recommended_validation: Regenerate a proposal from a Welding assessment output sample.
Verify proposal formatting for monthly search counts and null-volume records.
Confirm client-facing language treats Keyword Planner counts as estimates, not guaranteed demand.

summary: Assessment reports can now include Senior Living demand fit and estimated monthly searches in demand opportunities; downstream proposal generation should handle the new sector label and optional monthly volume fields.
recommended_validation: Regenerate a proposal from a Senior Living assessment output sample.
Verify proposal formatting for monthly search counts and null-volume records.
Confirm client-facing language treats Keyword Planner counts as estimates, not guaranteed demand.
